title: Wild Pack
description: A BOTW inspired minecraft modpack that brings over the stamina system and replaces hunger.
body:
![The Legend of Minecraft Breath of The Wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ef73187797fa497f6c786f9c51d090a731f33f7.png)
### What is this?
This is a modpack (obviously) that takes mechanics from the legend of zelda BOTW; notably, the new (or lack of) hunger system, hunger is GONE! Food restores your health, and gets consumed almost immediately, as well as the BOTW stamina wheel. There is a small bout of new items available like new bows & arrows.

Credits to [ZainnCraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/zainncraft/) & [Retroaton](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/retroatron/) for the included maps.
